svg.title: QuantumScribe full training pipeline with SFT and GRPO
svg.desc: Three-stage diagram showing data generation feeding into SFT warmup, then GRPO reinforcement learning against the deployed environment, with the OpenEnv server containing simulation backend and five-component reward function.

g.text: 50 steps · LoRA r=16 · ~30 min on T4
1500 steps · loads SFT checkpoint as starting policy
